bm25.query: What is the assessment weighting for CS101 (coursework, midterm, final)?
hits: CS101 FAQ Q: How do I contact the convenor? A: Email Dr. Alice Wong at alice.wong@hkbu.edu.hk or visit office hours Tue 14:00–15:00. Q: Where can I submit assignments? A: Submit via the LMS assignment link before the deadline; late submissions may incur penalties. Q: Who do I contact for lab issues? A: Contact the TA for your lab group (see course announcements) or email cs-office@hkbu.edu.hk.
